headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 9, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind a strong pitching performance from Mike Burrows. In other action, the Colorado Rockies outlasted the Philadelphia Phillies 9-7, while the Oakland Athletics edged the Baltimore Orioles 4-3.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams, with Tyler Glasnow being placed on the 15-day injured list by the Los Angeles Dodgers due to low back spasms. Other players on the injured list include Jake Mangum (Pittsburgh Pirates), Cade Povich (Baltimore Orioles), Travis d'Arnaud (Los Angeles Angels), Cole Ragans (Kansas City Royals), Jasson Domínguez (New York Yankees), Luis Campusano (San Diego Padres), and Joe Musgrove (San Diego Padres).

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, including the Baltimore Orioles acquiring Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. The Chicago Cubs also acquired Tyler Ferguson from the Athletics, while the Minnesota Twins received Yoendrys Gómez from the Tampa Bay Rays in a cash deal.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Reds 10-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind a strong pitching performance. Mike Burrows led the way with 7.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs allowed.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rally Past Phillies in Thrilling 9-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies outlasted the Philadelphia Phillies 9-7, securing a crucial win on the road. Hunter Goodman led the Rockies' offense with a 4-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Athletics Edge Orioles in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a narrow win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Jacob Lopez earning the win and Hogan Harris securing the save.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Toronto**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 0-2 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the team with 1 hit, 1 RBI, and 3 at-bats. Dylan Cease earned the win for the Blue Jays, pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts, 0 earned runs, and 0 walks.

top_news.title: **Glasnow Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-hander Tyler Glasnow has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to low back spasms. The move was made on May 8, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Enyel Garcia in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Enyel Garcia in a trade with the Philadelphia Phillies. The deal also includes right-handed pitcher Maicol Lauriano, with the Phillies receiving cash in return.
